actions.title: Deploy phishing-resistant MFA for admins and remote access
actions.description: Strengthen identity assurance for privileged and remote access accounts.

actions.title: Implement immutable backups and recovery testing
actions.description: Improve ransomware and recovery resilience through isolated backups and regular testing.

actions.title: Harden privileged access and administrative segregation
actions.description: Reduce administrative compromise likelihood by introducing PAM and account separation.

actions.title: Strengthen email protection and finance verification controls
actions.description: Reduce phishing-led fraud and payment diversion through verification controls and mailbox protections.

actions.title: Improve vendor risk management for critical providers
actions.description: Reduce supplier-related risk through assurance, segmentation, and continuity planning.

actions.title: Harden internet-facing applications and improve monitoring
actions.description: Reduce exposure to application compromise and data breach scenarios.
